noFleet.detail: Connect an agent to start monitoring your printers.

liveUnavailable.title: Live updates unavailable

liveDisconnected.title: Live updates disconnected
liveDisconnected.detail: Reconnecting — showing the last known state.

inventory.noTenantMessage: Ask your administrator to create a tenant and assign you to it, then select it in the header. Printers appear here once an agent reports them.
inventory.noPrintersMessage: Connect an agent and run a printer refresh to populate this inventory.
inventory.noMatchesMessage: No printers match your search or filter.
inventory.jobsSubtitle: Queued, dispatched, and physical print history
inventory.jobsNoTenantMessage: Select a tenant to inspect jobs.
inventory.jobsEmptyMessage: Dispatch a project file from the Dispatch section to a printer to create your first print job.
inventory.jobsNoMatchesMessage: No jobs match your search or filter.

dispatch.title: Dispatch print job
dispatch.subtitle: Upload a project artifact to the selected tenant printer
dispatch.noTenantMessage: Select a tenant to dispatch jobs.
dispatch.noPrintersMessage: A reported printer is required before jobs can be dispatched.
dispatch.plateHelp: Which plate from the project file to print. Use 1 if the file has a single plate.
dispatch.useAmsHelp: Use the printer's AMS units to pick filament for each part of the print.
dispatch.flowCaliHelp: Run flow dynamics calibration first. Improves extrusion accuracy but adds time before the print.
dispatch.timelapseHelp: Record a timelapse of the print with the printer's camera.

recoveryPage.title: Recovery actions
recoveryPage.subtitle: Refresh, dispatch retry, reprint, live print controls, and duplicate — shown per job state
recoveryPage.noTenantMessage: Select a tenant to run recovery actions.
recoveryPage.noAgentsRefresh: No agents available for manual refresh
recoveryPage.noJobsMessage: Jobs will appear here when dispatch history exists.
recoveryPage.printerUnavailable: Printer record unavailable for live controls
recoveryPage.liveUnavailable: Live controls unavailable for unknown printer model
recoveryPage.stopMessage: Stop this print? The current job cannot be resumed from where it stops.

diagnostics.noTenantMessage: Select a tenant to inspect agents.
diagnostics.noAgentsMessage: Create an agent pairing before running discovery.
diagnostics.title: Discovery and diagnostics
diagnostics.noCommandMessage: Run discovery or diagnostics to inspect the latest structured result.
diagnostics.noStructuredMessage: The selected command has not returned result data.
diagnostics.noPrintersDiscoveredMessage: Discovery completed with no SSDP responses.
diagnostics.externalStorageHelp: Whether the printer can read print files from its SD card or external storage.
diagnostics.ftpsCapHelp: Printer firmware caps FTPS at TLS 1.2. The agent uses a compatible TLS profile when available.
diagnostics.clearDataFallbackHelp: Whether the agent can fall back to clear-data FTPS transfer for this model family.

admin.title: Tenant administration
admin.noTenantMessage: Select a tenant to manage users, tokens, and agent pairings.
admin.unavailableMessage: The current auth context cannot read tenant admin resources.
admin.name: Name
admin.noUsersMessage: Create a tenant user to assign operator or viewer access.
admin.noJoinLinksMessage: Create a join link to invite externally authenticated users.
admin.revokeJoinMessage: Revoke this join link? It will no longer accept new members; existing members keep their access.
admin.noTokensMessage: Create scoped tenant tokens for automation or plugin login.
admin.revokeTokenMessage: Revoke this tenant token? Anything using it (automation, agents, plugins) will stop authenticating immediately.
admin.rotateTokenMessage: Rotate this tenant token? The current secret stops working immediately — update anything using it (automation, agents, plugins) with the new value.
admin.tokenShownOnce: This token is shown once and is not persisted by the browser.
admin.joinTokenShownOnce: This join token is shown once and is not persisted by the browser.
admin.pairingShownOnce: This pairing output is shown once and is not persisted by the browser.

onboarding.title: Tenant onboarding
onboarding.subtitle: {name} authenticated by {provider}
onboarding.verifiedMessage: Verify the email address in the external auth provider before creating or joining a tenant.
onboarding.createMessage: The current external identity becomes tenant admin.
onboarding.joinMessage: Open an invitation URL from a tenant admin, or paste the token on the join page.

signIn.title: Studio sign-in
signIn.subtitle: Create a one-use Pandar plugin login ticket
signIn.externalConfigMessage: Configure external auth before creating plugin login tickets.
signIn.authMessage: Authenticate before creating plugin login tickets.
signIn.noTenantsMessage: Authenticate with a tenant-scoped account before signing in from Studio.
